T^r. 3WTWT, % ^ T ^llrH=P) iflt|)R)<6) ¥WH", # ^ T - 6 8 2 0 2 9 , f e r *P?^T fl^sH >dtMK R-M?d R+W illBl+<ul P^RM^TI, 1972 % f^PT 3(2) (^) % afcPfa R^«kl yif^+<«l ^ 28 «ft ^TcT f^TR ¥Tf, '^rife *f. 9-ft/476, *P?^T 29 «ft ^ ^ T T ^ SPT^ ^ l ^ * l ^ , 23, ^ T T % ^ ^ f ^ T ^fT-363007, crfrprRW *P?^T 30 «ft STT^R ijfif, f t . t . 50-15-5/2 T T ^ ^ f R , ^fldl^Hl^d f%9ll*=IHdHH f%£t, 3Tt?T^T-530016 *P?^T [W. ¥.1/9/2009 - tft(xrrrft)-^g-.II] -- 3 of 5 -- 4 T H E G A Z E T T E O F I N D I A : E X T R A O R D I N A R Y [PART I I — S E C . 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY (Department of Commerce) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 3rd December, 2015 S.O. 3270(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of section 4 of the Marine Products Export Development Authority Act, 1972 (13 of 1972), read with rules 3 and 4 of the Marine Products Export Development Authority Rules, 1972 and in supersession of the notification of Government of India published vide S.O. No. 884 (E) dated 20th March 2014, the Central Government hereby appoints the following persons to be members of Marine Products Export Development Authority, for a period of three years from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette, namely: Chairman, Marine Products Export Development Authority appointed under section 4 (3) (a) 1. Chairman, Marine Products Export Development Authority, Chairman Kochi, Kerala Director, Marine Products Export Development Authority appointed under section 4 (3) (b) 2. Director, Marine Products Export Development Authority, Member, Ex-Officio Kochi, Kerala Members of Parliament [Two Members from Lok Sabha and One Member from Rajya Sabha] appointed under section 4 (3) (c) 3. Vacant. 4. Vacant. 5. Vacant. Representatives of Ministries of Central Government appointed under section 4 (3) (d) 6. Joint Secretary (Fisheries) Department of Animal Husbandry, Dairying and Fisheries, Member Ministry of Agriculture Government of India New Delhi 7. Director (Finance) Department of Commerce Ministry of Commerce and Industry Member Government of India New Delhi 8. Director or Deputy Secretary (Export Promotion – Marine Products) Member Department of Commerce Ministry of Commerce and Industry Government of India New Delhi 9. Joint Secretary Ministry of Food Processing industry Member Government of India New Delhi 10. Deputy Director General, Directorate General of Shipping, Mumbai Member Ministry of Shipping Government of India Representatives of Governments of the States or Union Territories having a sea-coast appointed under section 4 (3) (e) (i) 11. Commissioner or Secretary (Fisheries) Member Government of Andhra Pradesh 12. Commissioner or Secretary (Fisheries) Member Government of Gujarat 13. Commissioner or Secretary (Fisheries) Member Government of Kerala -- 4 of 5 -- II— <a u s 3 (ii)] TO 3?i J^m : awnw^ 5 14. Commissioner or Secretary (Fisheries) Member Government of Maharashtra 15. Commissioner or Secretary (Fisheries) Member Government of Karnataka 16. Commissioner or Secretary (Fisheries) Member Government of Odisha 17. Commissioner or Secretary (Fisheries) Member Government of Tamil Nadu 18. Commissioner or Secretary (Fisheries) Member Government of West Bengal 19. Commissioner or Secretary (Fisheries) Member Government of Puducherry Representatives of owners of Fishing Vessels, Processing Plants or Storage Premises for Marine Products and Conveyances used for the Transport of Marine products appointed under rule 3 (2) (c) of Marine Products Export Development Authority Rules, 1972. 20. Shri KSR Loganathan, Chinnathakadu, Thambikkottai, Member Melakadu, Pattukottaitk, Tanjavur Distt.- 614704, Tamil Nadu 21. Shri Veljibhai Masani, Gujarat Member 22. Vacant. Member 23. Vacant. Member Representatives of dealers and persons employed in the Marine Products Industry appointed under rule 3 (2) (d) of Marine Products Export Development Authority Rules, 1972. 24. Shri P. Jayaprakash, West of TD Temple, TD Nagar, Member Cutchery Ward, Kollam – 691013, Kerala 25. Vacant. Member 26. Vacant. Member Representative of persons employed in research institutions engaged in research connected with the marine products industry appointed under rule 3 (2) (e) of Marine Products Export Development Authority Rules, 1972. 27. Dr. S. Ashaletha, Central Institute of Fisheries Technology, Member Willingdon Island, Matsyapuri Post, Cochin – 682029, Kerala Representatives of other persons or class of persons, ought to be represented on the Authority, appointed under rule 3 (2) (f) of Marine Products Export Development Authority Rules, 1972. 28. Shri Basanta Kumar Sahoo, Plot No. 9-D/476, Member Sector – 8, CDA, Cuttack – 14, Odisha 29. Shri WH Sankara Subramanian, 23, Desiya Seva Samithi, Member Maravaneri main Road, Salem – 363007, Tamil Nadu 30. Shri Bhaskara Murty, D.No. 50-15-5/2, Member Rajendra Nagar, Seethammapeta, Vishakhapatnam City, Andhra Pradesh - 530016 [F. No. 1/9/2009 – EP (MP) – Vol.II] SANTOSH KUMAR SARANGI, Jt. Secy.
